positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the overhead food photograph. Preserve the original aspect ratio, top-down composition, brown bowl of cold soup, diced vegetables and ham, dill, half boiled egg, rye bread slices, burlap cloth, sour cream pitcher, dark drink glass, and wooden table. The first frame is already a finished plated meal, not a cooking or serving action. During the clip, a few tiny ripples move gently across the dark soup surface as if the bowl has just settled on the table; the floating dill and small diced pieces bob almost imperceptibly, then return to a calm stable position. By the final frames, the liquid surface is still and the toppings remain arranged like the original image. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable overhead drift with gentle parallax, minimal and elegant. Add only subtle visible motion: small liquid reflections shimmer in the soup and drink glass, soft highlights shift on the sour cream and bowl rim. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable food shapes, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: Do not add hands, spoon, pouring, stirring, eating, steam, boiling, splashing, spilling, new ingredients, moving bread, moving pitcher, moving glass, rotating bowl, or changing the plated arrangement, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting food, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, text artifacts, logo distortion.
